name: MQL5 Gemini Sandbox
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y wget gnupg           && wget -q -O - https://dl-ssl.google.com/linux/linux_signing_key.pub | sudo apt-key add - && sudo sh -c 'echo "deb [arch=amd64] http://dl.google.com/linux/chrome/deb/ stable main" >> /etc/apt/sources.list.d/google.list' && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y google-chrome-stable &&                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_20.x | sudo -E bash - && sudo apt-get install -y nodejs && sudo npm install -g @google/gemini-cli

sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y wget gnupg xdg-utils locales fonts-noto-cjk && sudo locale-gen ja_JP.UTF-8 && wget -q -O - https://dl-ssl.google.com/linux/linux_signing_key.pub | sudo apt-key add - && sudo sh -c 'echo "deb [arch=amd64] http://dl.google.com/linux/chrome/deb/ stable main" >> /etc/apt/sources.list.d/google.list' && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y google-chrome-stable && sudo sed -i 's|Exec=/usr/bin/google-chrome-stable|Exec=/usr/bin/google-chrome-stable --no-sandbox --disable-dev-shm-usage|g' /usr/share/applications/google-chrome.desktop && xdg-settings set default-web-browser google-chrome.desktop && curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_20.x | sudo -E bash - && sudo apt-get install -y nodejs && sudo npm install -g @google/gemini-cli
